discover.title: Search
discover.subtitle: Search your library and TMDB to request new titles.
discover.noResultsHint: Try another title or check the spelling.
discover.requestSeasonsHint: Request the missing seasons of this show
discover.fillGapsHint: Request to fill the missing episodes
requests.mySubtitle: Track the status of your movie and show requests.
auth.whoWatchingHint: Choose a profile, or link a device with quick connect.
auth.loginLocked: Too many login attempts, try again later
auth.emailTaken: This email is already in use
auth.inviteInvalidDesc: This invitation link has expired, has already been used, or doesn't exist.
connect.title: Connect a device
connect.backToProfiles: Press Back to return to profiles
connect.codePromptForUser: Enter the 4-digit code shown on your TV to connect it to {name}'s account.
connect.codePrompt: Enter the 4-digit code shown on your TV to connect it to the account.
connect.willConnectSoon: Your TV will connect in a moment.
connect.serverNotFoundHint: Make sure the server is running on the network ({platform}), or enter its address.
connect.discoveryHint: Automatic detection on the local network (mDNS).
connect.scanQr: Scan this QR with your phone
playbackEngine.title: Playback engine
player.stoppedDefault: Playback was stopped by the administrator.
player.aacReencoded: re-encoded to stereo AAC for this browser
player.cantPlay: Can't play stream unavailable or codec not supported.
player.av1Unsupported: AV1 isn't supported on this device.
player.audioUnsupported: {codec} audio is not supported by this browser (no sound). Try Safari or the TV app.
player.hint: ▲ Progress bar · ◀ ▶ Skip 5s (hold to scrub) · OK Play/Pause · Back to exit
player.audioReencodedToast: ♪ {codec} audio re-encoded to stereo AAC for this browser.
player.subGenError: Generation failed (no AI provider, or an error).
player.subGenBackground: Processing continues in the background; you can close this panel.
stats.title: Stats for nerds
admin.serverIdentityDesc: How your server appears on your devices
admin.tmdbLanguageHint: TMDB code for posters and overviews, e.g. fr-FR, en-US. Empty = server default. Applies on the next enrichment.
admin.watchAutoScanHint: Detects file additions/removals and re-scans automatically.
admin.showRecentHome: Show recent additions on the home screen
admin.publicUserList: Show the profile list on the login screen
admin.publicUserListHint: When off, nobody can list existing accounts from the server URL; sign in with email and password
admin.themeSongsHint: Loop a series' title theme on its detail page (downloaded on the next scan)
admin.introDetectionHint: off · chapters (free, from embedded chapters) · fingerprint (audio analysis, heavy: run the 'Marker detection' job)
admin.remoteManagedHint: Optional. If your server has no tunnel yet, LUMA can run and supervise cloudflared to expose a public HTTPS URL without port-forwarding. If you already run a tunnel (a shared container, a system service), leave this off and just set the public URL.
admin.remoteTokenHint: Paste the Cloudflare Tunnel connector token. The server runs cloudflared and supervises it.
admin.remoteBinaryMissing: cloudflared binary not available on the server.
admin.localDiscoveryHint: Automatic detection on the local network
admin.hwAccelDesc: LUMA streams in direct play; only audio is re-encoded when needed
admin.qualityPerfDesc: LUMA streams by direct play (remux): only the number of concurrent sessions is capped there's no server-side video re-encoding.
admin.mediaConcurrencyHint: How many heavy background passes (storyboards, subtitles, intro/credits) run at once. 0 = auto (leaves a core free). Lower it if processing makes the server sluggish.
error.notFoundBody: This page has moved or never existed. Let's get you back to your library.
error.unauthorizedBody: Your session has ended. Sign in again to keep watching.
error.forbiddenBody: Your account doesn't have permission to view this page.
error.serverBody: The server hit an unexpected error. Try again in a moment.
error.noMediaFile: No media file for this item
error.noAudioTracks: This item has no audio tracks for a master playlist
error.tmdbUnavailable: TMDB is not available on this server
auth.registerInvalid: A valid email, username and password (≥ 4 characters) are required
admin.cantDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account
admin.namingSub: File naming templates (Sonarr/Radarr format) and library rename.
naming.renameHelp: Renames every file that does not match the templates above. Watched state and progress are preserved (ids are title-based, not path-based).
naming.allMatch: Every file already matches the templates.
naming.confirmBody: This moves files on disk. It is safe (in-place rename) but not undoable without another rename. Continue?
admin.sectionDenied: You don't have permission to access this section.
admin.noAdminAccess: You don't have access to server administration.
admin.pageNetworkSub: Remote access, secure connections and discovery.
admin.usersSub: Manage access and the sharing of your libraries.
admin.usersEmptyHint: Invite members to share your libraries.
admin.permRequestAutoHint: This account's requests skip the approval queue
admin.name: Name
admin.inviteIntro: Generate an invitation link to share. The person creates their account with the checked permissions.
admin.noUsersPermission: You don't have permission to manage users.
admin.librariesSub: Your media collections and their scans.
admin.noLibraries: No libraries. Add one to start a scan.
admin.cacheLimitDesc: Maximum space reserved for downloaded posters and backdrops
admin.transcodeCacheLimitDesc: Disk budget for live HLS segments. Idle streams are trimmed oldest-first; a stream playing now is never interrupted
admin.clearCacheDesc: Frees {size} of transcodes and downloaded images
admin.resetMetadataDesc: Clears every TMDB entry (posters, cast, embeddings) to force a fresh enrichment. Then run the “TMDB enrichment” task.
admin.resetMetadataConfirm: Clear all TMDB metadata? Posters and descriptions will disappear until the next enrichment.
admin.backupSub: Move your server to another machine: export your data, then import it there.
admin.backupExportDesc: Downloads a ZIP with accounts, settings, watch history, resume positions, invites and custom avatars. The catalogue itself is rebuilt by a scan on the target.
admin.backupImportDesc: Restores accounts, settings and history from a backup file, then re-scans your libraries. Existing entries are overwritten by the backup.
admin.backupWarning: An unencrypted backup contains credentials (password hashes, API keys). Set a password to encrypt it, or store it somewhere safe and never share it.
admin.backupImported: Backup imported ({users} accounts) a re-scan has started. If your media paths differ, update the library folders, then re-scan.
admin.backupImportFailed: Import failed is this a valid LUMA backup file?
admin.backupExportFailed: Export failed check the server logs and try again.
admin.backupPasswordHint: Optional. Leave empty for an unencrypted ZIP; set one to encrypt the backup (you'll need it to restore).
admin.backupPasswordRequired: This backup is encrypted enter its password.
admin.backupResetHint: Wipe this server's accounts, settings and history before importing (a clean clone of the source).
admin.backupEncryptHint: Strongly recommended without it the file holds credentials in clear. You'll need the password to restore.
admin.backupEncryptedFile: This backup is encrypted enter its password to restore it.
auth.pinLocked: Too many attempts try again later
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
auth.tokenInvalid: Session expired, please sign in again
auth.sessionExpiredHint: Your session expired sign in again to pick up where you left off.
auth.sessionNotFound: That device is no longer signed in
passkey.ceremonyExpired: The passkey request expired, please try again
passkey.noPasskeys: No passkey is registered for this account
account.profileSub: Your photo, name and email address.
account.passwordSub: Change your password using your current one.
account.pinSub: Add a 4-digit PIN to lock this profile on shared devices (TV).
account.pinSubSet: A PIN protects this profile. Change or remove it below.
account.preferencesSub: Interface language and preferred playback tracks.
account.title: My profile
account.subtitle: Manage your information, display language and account security.
account.uiLanguageDesc: The language of menus and buttons.
account.audioDesc: Chosen automatically when a title offers it.
account.sessionsEmpty: No other devices are signed in.
account.passkeysDesc: Sign in without a password using Face ID, Touch ID or a security key.
account.passkeysInsecure: Passkeys need a secure (HTTPS) connection this device is on plain HTTP.
profiles.subtitle: Pick a profile, or link a device with Quick Connect.
addProfile.title: Add a profile
addProfile.subtitle: Choose the server, then link your profile with Quick Connect.
addProfile.noLocal: No server found on the network
connect.addServerSub: Enter your LUMA server's address, or detect it on the network.
connect.waitingApproval: Waiting for approval on another device…
connect.scanQrConnected: Scan this QR with a device that's already signed in
pin.clearSubtitle: Enter your PIN to remove it
search.hint: ▶ browse · OK open · ◀ back to keyboard
search.empty: Type with the remote to search a title, a genre or an actor…
person.role.creator: Creator
person.empty: No titles found for this person.
content.endsAt: Ends at {time} if you start now
content.myListEmpty: Your list is empty. Add titles with "My list" on a detail page.
content.filmsEmpty: No movies in the library yet.
content.seriesEmpty: No series in the library yet.
content.homeEmptyHint: Movies and series added to your libraries will show up here.
admin.jobsSub: Automate maintenance, recommendations and indexing on a cron schedule or run by hand.
jobs.cronHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday. E.g. "0 4 * * *" = every day at 04:00. Empty = manual-only.
jobs.cache.cleanup.name: Cache cleanup
jobs.cache.cleanup.desc: Clears the HLS transcode cache (regenerated on playback) and trims the poster cache to the configured size (oldest first).
jobs.recommendations.refresh.name: Refresh recommendations
jobs.recommendations.refresh.desc: Recomputes the vectors powering "For You" and similar rows.
jobs.recommendations.reembed.name: Re-embed recommendations
jobs.recommendations.reembed.desc: Re-encodes every title with the active embedding model from the metadata already in the database (after switching models, e.g. enabling MiniLM). No TMDB calls.
jobs.library.scan.name: Library scan
jobs.library.scan.desc: Rescans folders, syncs the database, then kicks probing and enrichment.
jobs.metadata.enrich.name: TMDB enrichment
jobs.metadata.enrich.desc: Re-imports posters, overviews and metadata from TMDB for the whole catalog.
jobs.search.reindex.name: Search reindex
jobs.search.reindex.desc: Rebuilds the full-text search index from the database.
jobs.acquisition.match.name: Request matching
jobs.acquisition.match.desc: Marks requests available when their titles appear in the library.
jobs.acquisition.search.name: Request search
jobs.acquisition.search.desc: Searches indexers for requested titles and starts downloads.
admin.acqGeneralDesc: Automatically search your indexers for approved requests.
admin.acqEnabledHint: Without this, only manual downloads (interactive search) work.
admin.acqAutoApproveHint: Otherwise only accounts with the requests.auto capability skip the approval queue.
admin.acqDeleteAfterImportHint: Remove the torrent and its data once imported into the library (frees the download folder and stops seeding; the library copy is kept).
admin.acqQualityDesc: How the decision engine scores releases. HEVC-first: that is LUMA's philosophy.
admin.acqPreferHevcHint: Large score bonus for x265/HEVC releases.
admin.acqRequiredKeywordsHint: Comma-separated; a release must contain all of them (e.g. VOSTFR).
admin.acqForbiddenKeywordsHint: Any release containing one of these words is rejected.
admin.acqEngineDesc: The BitTorrent engine built into LUMA (librqbit). Restarted automatically when these settings change.
admin.acqVpnDesc: Kill switch and tunnel check. The WireGuard config is set on the Downloads page.
admin.vpnKillSwitchHint: Pauses downloads when the proxy is unreachable or not diverting traffic.
admin.indexersSub: Torznab endpoints (Jackett, Prowlarr) used to search for requested titles.
indexers.name: Name
indexers.urlHint: Full Torznab feed URL, including the /api path (Jackett: the Copy Torznab feed button).
indexers.apiKeyKept: A key is stored. Leave empty to keep it.
indexers.priorityHint: Flat score bonus to break ties between indexers.
indexers.emptyBody: Add your Jackett or Prowlarr instance (Torznab feed) so LUMA can search for approved requests.
admin.pageAcquisitionSub: Quality profile, embedded engine and VPN for automatic downloads.
admin.downloadsSub: Live download queue, history and torrent clients.
downloads.vpnBlocked: Kill switch engaged: downloads held, VPN unreachable
dlclients.name: Name
dlclients.passwordKept: A password is stored. Leave empty to keep it.
dlclients.embeddedSub: The BitTorrent engine built into LUMA (settings under Acquisition).
manual.title: Manual add
manual.magnetHint: Paste a magnet, or pick a result above.
manual.titleHint: Movie or show name (for the folder + filename).
jobs.acquisition.import.name: Download import
jobs.acquisition.import.desc: Moves finished downloads into the library and chains a scan.
vpn.title: VPN (WireGuard)
vpn.modeWireguard: WireGuard config managed by LUMA. Torrent traffic goes through the tunnel (local port :{port}).
vpn.modeOff: No VPN: torrent traffic goes out directly. Paste a WireGuard config to tunnel it.
vpn.notSealed: The tunnel is not diverting traffic (same IP or proxy unreachable)
vpn.modalHelp: Paste your VPN provider's WireGuard configuration (Mullvad, AirVPN, Proton, a self-hosted peer...). Prefer a P2P-friendly server. Only torrent traffic goes through the tunnel; the rest of the server is unaffected.
vpn.configKept: A configuration is already stored; pasting a new one replaces it.
jobs.pipeline.probe.name: Media probing
jobs.pipeline.probe.desc: Runs ffprobe on each file to read codecs, duration, tracks and embedded chapters. Incremental: only probes files that changed.
jobs.pipeline.metadata.name: TMDB metadata
jobs.pipeline.metadata.desc: Resolves posters, backdrops, overviews and cast from TMDB per movie and show. Incremental: skips resolved titles and records misses so they are not retried every run.
jobs.pipeline.embed.name: Content embeddings
jobs.pipeline.embed.desc: Computes the content embedding behind 'For You' and similar rows from each title's metadata. Re-embeds when the model changes.
jobs.pipeline.storyboard.name: Storyboard previews
jobs.pipeline.storyboard.desc: Pre-generates the scrub-bar hover-thumbnail sheets so the preview is instant. Incremental and resumable: only builds what is missing and pauses while anyone is watching.
jobs.pipeline.subtitles.name: Subtitle extraction
jobs.pipeline.subtitles.desc: Pre-extracts each embedded text subtitle track to WebVTT so it loads instantly at playback instead of demuxing the whole file on first use. One ffmpeg pass per file for all tracks; incremental and resumable, and pauses while anyone is watching. Image subs (PGS/VobSub) are skipped.
jobs.pipeline.markers.name: Marker detection
jobs.pipeline.markers.desc: Fingerprints episode audio, one season at a time, to detect intro/credits segments. Incremental: skips seasons whose episodes are unchanged.
admin.pipelineSub: Per-item processing broken into stages. Incremental and resumable: a re-run only does what is missing, and failed items are individually visible and retriable.
pipeline.reprocessNote: Runs the element back through the whole pipeline. Only missing work is redone.
pipeline.epsNote: The series reflects its episodes' treatment state (probe, previews, markers).
pipeline.pauseHint: Hold all background processing (storyboards, subtitles, intro/credits, embeddings). In-progress work stops at the next step and resumes where it left off.
pipeline.pausedBanner: Background processing is paused. No new storyboards, subtitles, intro/credits or embeddings will run until you resume.
pipeline.searchPlaceholder: Search a movie, episode or show…
jobs.sections.personalize.name: Personalized sections (AI)
jobs.sections.personalize.desc: Analyzes each user's taste and has the configured LLM name their home sections.
jobs.sections.curate.name: Editorial collections (AI)
jobs.sections.curate.desc: Builds catalog-wide collections everyone sees director spotlights plus LLM-curated genre, list, franchise and mood rows.
admin.aiSectionDesc: Language model for personalized sections and taste profiles.
admin.aiEnabledHint: Generates personalized home sections via the "Personalized sections" job
admin.aiProviderHint: openai = any OpenAI-compatible server (Ollama, llama.cpp…); anthropic = Claude
admin.aiBaseUrlHint: e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 (Ollama). Leave empty for Anthropic.
admin.aiApiKeyHint: Required for Anthropic / OpenAI; not needed for a local Ollama
admin.aiSub: Configure the language model that names your personalized sections and builds taste profiles.
admin.aiBaseUrlOpenrouter: Optional defaults to openrouter.ai; models like "qwen/qwen-2.5-7b-instruct"
admin.aiProvidersHint: Register one or more model providers and pick the default used for generation.
admin.aiNoProviders: No providers yet add one to enable AI features.
